name: loop state persists across steps: graph.json written, reloaded, audit log correct
description: Verifies loop_state.js persistence: createLoop writes graph.json, appendNode adds 4 nodes, appendAuditRow writes 3 JSONL rows, setCurrentState updates current_state, loadLoop re-reads the same content (simulated restart). Each audit row is validated against AuditLogRow required fields. Cleanup deletes test_s140 project directory.
